title: Lightning rod right click
description: Summon lightning by clicking on the lightning rod
body:
You can now summon lightning in stormy weather only by interacting with a copper rod with your hand! Right-click on the lightning rod in stormy weather to cause a thunderstorm.
![Lighting rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53c114db16562cb612f82f93b9c6cbb6bc6bc3bb.png)
